torch_pattern: attn_weights = torch.matmul(Q, K_unpaged.transpose(-2, -1)) * scale; attn_weights = attn_weights + attn_mask; attn_weights = torch.softmax(attn_weights, dim=-1); out = torch.matmul(attn_weights, V_unpaged)

config_template.cur_pos_tensor: int32 tensor of shape [{BATCH}] holding current decode position per user
config_template.page_table_tensor: int32 tensor of shape [{BATCH}, {MAX_NUM_BLOCKS_PER_SEQ}] mapping logical KV blocks to physical pages
config_template.is_causal: True (default) or False with explicit attn_mask

weight_transform: K/V caches must be pre-transformed into paged layout: contiguous [B, NH_KV, S, DH] cache is shuffled into [num_blocks, NH_KV, block_size, DH] physical pages addressed via page_table_tensor; Q is reshaped to decode layout [1, B, NH_Q, DH] (seq dim 1 per user). No torch-side weight transform; mask (if non-causal) must be tilized.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, B, NH_Q, padded_cache_len] decode mask, non-causal path
[1, B, NH_Q, DH] decode output (seq=1 per user)

memory_config.shard_spec_template: HEIGHT_SHARDED, shard_shape=[NH_Q_padded, {DH}], use_height_and_width_as_shard_shape=True, one batch per core

placement_observations.source: model call sites (memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, multiple llama/falcon-style attention modules)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, B_per_device_group, NH_Q_local, DH] batched decode output, batch-dependent shard
[num_blocks, NH_KV, block_size, DH] paged KV cache, full context length
placement_observations.source: model call sites (k_cache/v_cache persistent paged caches kept in DRAM across decode steps)
